description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a before_script that runs 'yarn global add codecov' and then 'yarn' to install dependencies. Define a single stage named test and a job called test that runs in this stage and executes 'yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN'. The pipeline does not define any services, artifacts, or conditional rules.
